name: Sahil Chandel
title: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

points: Developed a multi-role gaming platform using React.js, Node.js, Express.js and WebSockets.
Deployed production app on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy.
Built backend services and validated APIs using Postman, cURL and HTTPie.
Automated scraping workflows using Python, Selenium and BeautifulSoup.
Integrated Selenium scripts with Bash tools on AWS.
Configured virtual display server to avoid scraping detection.
Built Bash pipelines to automate script execution and clear Chrome cache.

projects.name: Honecker Haushalt AI Receptionist (Freelance)
description: Developed an AI-powered voice receptionist for a premium cleaning agency to automate service bookings and job applications.
Built backend services using FastAPI and the Vapi AI framework for real-time voice interaction and workflow automation.
Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) knowledge base to answer customer FAQs and service-related queries.
Created custom APIs to log real-time booking and applicant data into Google Sheets using Google Sheets API.
Designed an intent detection pipeline to differentiate between customer bookings and employment applications.
Implemented structured data validation using Pydantic to capture customer details such as names, locations, and dates reliably.

projects.name: Order Processing Micro-SaaS
description: Developed a production-ready asynchronous order processing micro-SaaS using Go, RabbitMQ, Postgres, and Redis.
Built an API service in Go handling authenticated HTTP requests, idempotent order submission, and real-time WebSocket streaming.
Implemented a worker service consuming RabbitMQ messages with retry logic and at-least-once delivery for fault-tolerant processing.
Used Postgres as the system of record with UNIQUE(tenant_id, idempotency_key) constraints to guarantee idempotency.
Implemented event logging in Redis to maintain an append-only order event history for observability.
Added webhook dispatching for terminal order states and exposed Prometheus metrics for monitoring API and worker performance.

projects.name: Java Elasticsearch Search Engine
description: Built a backend search service using Java, Spring Boot, and Elasticsearch for fast full-text search and filtering.
Designed REST APIs with Spring Boot and managed dependencies using Maven.
Configured Elasticsearch on a Linux environment and optimized indexing for efficient search performance.
Containerized the backend and search infrastructure using Docker for reproducible deployments.
Integrated Elasticsearch Query DSL for advanced search capabilities and structured data retrieval.

projects.name: Golang Blog Platform
description: Built a lightweight backend using Go's net/http and html/template without external frameworks.
Integrated MongoDB Atlas for scalable cloud-based data storage.
Implemented LaTeX rendering in blog posts using MathJax.
Focused on efficient server-side rendering and clean backend architecture.

projects.name: Woods Indica – E-commerce Website
description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce platform using React and Firebase.
Integrated Razorpay payment gateway with transaction verification.
Built an admin dashboard with real-time analytics for monitoring users and sales.
Implemented dynamic cart functionality along with product search and filtering.
